task_snapshot.title: Production health container login and file smoke dry-run plan
acceptance: Defines dry-run and controlled-execution plans for MODE=full pnpm prod:health, bash scripts/verify-api-login-dockerexec.sh, and node scripts/e2e/first-release-files.mjs.
Documents required target, credentials, TEST_RUN_ID, cleanup plan, file storage root, and approval conditions before any production-like execution.
Separates read-only health/login checks from file upload/download/delete smoke and marks write-path smoke as approval-gated.
Records expected evidence for upload, download, delete, deleted-file rejection, and file backup linkage.
Does not run production health, container login verification, or file smoke against a real target in this task without approval.
